MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BRANNAN STREET FITNESS, INC'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR DELAY IN PROSECUTION.
Appearances: Zolema Iniguez (290.6465) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona; David A. Lucero of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (438.6641) for defendant and moving party.
Argued and the court granted plaintiff's request for time to oppose the motion. Plaintiff to file an opposition by August 30, 2011, defendant to file a reply by September 6, 2011. Matter continued to September 9, 2011. Plaintiff is directed to provide her contact information to defendant's counsel. (302/LMG) Judge Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153
